testCase.name: MarkdownImageExtractorService removes markdown image syntax and returns image metadata
testCase.failure:
Error: expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
- Expected - 0 + Received + 1
See the diagram below. + Fig. 19.1 at Object.<anonymous> (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/src/imports/mapper/markdown-image.extractor.spec.ts:11:25) at Promise.then.completed (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-circus/build/utils.js:298:28) at new Promise (<anonymous>) at callAsyncCircusFn (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-circus/build/utils.js:231:10) at _callCircusTest (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:316:40) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5) at _runTest (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:252:3) at _runTestsForDescribeBlock (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:126:9) at _runTestsForDescribeBlock (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:121:9) at run (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-circus/build/run.js:71:3) at runAndTransformResultsToJestFormat (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-circus/build/legacy-code-todo-rewrite/jestAdapterInit.js:122:21) at jestAdapter (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-circus/build/legacy-code-todo-rewrite/jestAdapter.js:79:19) at runTestInternal (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-runner/build/runTest.js:367:16) at runTest (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-runner/build/runTest.js:444:34) at Object.worker (/Users/sharun/Documents/Personal Projects/ez-prep-api/node_modules/jest-runner/build/testWorker.js:106:12)

testCase.name: MarkdownImageExtractorService prefers images from the source markdown block over AI output
MarkdownImageExtractorService extracts diagrams placed after the option list into question content
MarkdownImageExtractorService does not attach post-option diagrams to the last option label
Phase 2 import validators and mapper validates a correct AI JSON payload with Zod
Phase 2 import validators and mapper rejects malformed AI JSON
Phase 2 import validators and mapper passes NEET business validation
Phase 2 import validators and mapper rejects wrong option count for NEET
Phase 2 import validators and mapper maps validated output to the Question schema shape with option UUIDs
Phase 2 import validators and mapper extracts question images into image metadata instead of question text
Phase 2 import validators and mapper assigns post-option Mathpix diagrams to the question stem, not the last option
Phase 2 import validators and mapper validates batch AI JSON payloads with Zod
Phase 2 import validators and mapper chunks all questions into a single batch by default
Persist question validation accepts a valid import question payload
Persist question validation defaults source to PDF_UPLOAD when omitted
Persist question validation rejects non-PDF_UPLOAD source values
Persist question validation rejects when correctAnswer does not match an option id
Persist question validation rejects questions without text or image
Persist question validation accepts full enrich API response after request body parsing
